inclusion_criteria: Human observational studies (e.g., cross-sectional, cohort, case-control, or repeated-measures) that compare groups by menstrual cycle phase (follicular vs luteal) and/or menopausal status (pre- vs post-menopause).
Population: healthy adult, non-pregnant women from menarche through post-menopause without ocular or systemic disease affecting the posterior pole.

Reports quantitative posterior pole structural outcomes (e.g., macular morphology, subfoveal/segmental choroidal thickness, optic disc/retinal nerve head characteristics) measured by ocular imaging (e.g., OCT/EDI-OCT/swept-source OCT).
Includes explicit stratification or within-subject comparison by menstrual phase and/or menopausal status.
exclusion_criteria: Studies including males, pregnant or lactating women, pre-menarche participants, or participants with ocular/systemic pathology affecting the posterior pole (e.g., glaucoma, AMD, diabetes, high myopia, uncontrolled hypertension) unless healthy subgroups are analyzed separately.

Interventional studies manipulating hormones or ocular structure (e.g., initiation of hormonal contraception/HRT, ocular surgery, pharmacologic agents) without separate baseline phase/status comparisons.
No relevant outcomes (does not report quantitative posterior pole structural parameters) or no comparison by menstrual phase or menopausal status.
Non-original research (reviews, editorials), case reports/series without comparator, animal/in vitro studies, or conference abstracts without full data.
screening_criteria.description: Screen for human observational studies of healthy, non-pregnant adult women that compare posterior pole structural parameters across menstrual phases and/or menopausal status using ocular imaging.

included_articles.title: Assessment of choroidal vascularity index during the menstrual cycle.
Evaluation of the macula, retinal nerve fiber layer and choroid thickness in postmenopausal women and reproductive-age women using spectral-domain optical coherence tomography.
Effects of menopause on the retinal nerve fiber layer and ganglion cell complex and on intraocular pressure.
The effect of postmenopausal hormonal drop on optic nerve head and peripapillary perfusion using optical coherence tomography angiography (OCTA).
Choroidal Morphology and Systemic Circulation Changes During the Menstrual Cycle in Healthy Japanese Women.
Choroidal thickness changes during the menstrual cycle.
